hypothesis: Combining Keltner Channel breakout with volume confirmation and ATR volatility filtering creates a more robust entry signal by ensuring breakouts occur in high-volume, low-volatility environments where price movements are likely to persist. The ATR filter prevents false signals during low-volatility periods when breakouts are less reliable.

Keltner channel breakout with volume confirmation and ATR volatility filter captures strong momentum moves while avoiding false signals in low-volatility or choppy markets. The ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to market conditions, improving risk-adjusted returns.
